opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My old arm implant has suddenly become hot, red, and incredibly painful, and I can't straighten my arm. It was already overdue to come out and now I just want it taken out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The contraceptive implant in her upper arm was due for removal about six months ago, and over the last day the skin over it has turned red, hot and swollen and become very painful.

symptom_narrative.duration: about a day and getting worse
symptom_narrative.character: a hot, red, swollen area over the little rod she can feel under the skin, with severe throbbing pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it is incredibly painful and she is holding her arm against her body
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the inner side of her non-dominant (left) upper arm, right over where she can feel the implant
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily worsening since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — holding the arm still against her chest helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement of the arm, especially bending or straightening it
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feels a bit hot and shivery; frightened the redness will spread
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot straighten or use the arm normally and is guarding it against her chest

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: has a contraceptive implant in the arm that was put in years ago and was due to be replaced about six months ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: long-acting reversible contraceptive rod, left in past its replacement date

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: the contraceptive implant in her arm (etonogestrel rod)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about the infection getting into her bloodstream while she is on her own

objective_data_offered.value: a red, shiny, swollen patch about the size of a large coin over a firm lump in the inner upper arm; the skin looks angry and stretched
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video call only — extent, depth and any deep collection cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: the area feels hot to touch and is exquisitely tender even to a light touch
feels a bit feverish and shivery, but says she is not confused and is not shaking uncontrollably
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported; no home thermometer reading offered, so true temperature is unknown
